name: 6" Mini Tabletop Polka Dot Artificial Plant - Threshold™
description:
Liven up any space in your home with this Mini Tabletop Polka Dot Artificial Plant from Threshold™. This artificial decor features natural-looking polka dot plant to offer a lively vibe to your home decor, and comes inside a white ceramic container with faux soil for easy display on any flat surface. Just place this artificial tropical plant on the mantel, console or sideboard along with other potted plants to add warmth and texture to your space year-round.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
